plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow RG Medlink to use your location to find nearby pharmacies and deliver to your address.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow RG Medlink to use your location to find nearby pharmacies and deliver to your address.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow RG Medlink to access your camera to photograph prescriptions.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow RG Medlink to access your photos to upload prescriptions.
